commands.review_summary:
The PR adds update-scoped Windows Scheduled Task disable/enable handling around package-manager updates and regression tests for running, stopped, unknown, failure, and already-disabled task states.

PR surface: Source +164, Tests +372. Total +536 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.5.27 stop the Windows task with schtasks /End only before package replacement, and Microsoft documents /End as stopping only task-started program instances; I did not run the seeded native Windows package-update flow.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide proof sufficiency and availability-risk acceptance for a maintainer-labeled draft; there is no narrow automated code repair to request.

target.title: fix(update): guard Windows task autostart during package updates
target.body:
## Summary
- disables enabled Windows Scheduled Task autostart while a managed package update replaces the OpenClaw package tree
- covers running, stopped, and unclassified installed task runtimes, including `--no-restart` stopped/unknown cases where the task can still logon-start during replacement
- re-enables only tasks this update actually disabled, before post-core work, restart handoff, blocked-update exits, or failed-update exits
- leaves startup-folder fallback installs, unavailable `schtasks`, missing tasks, unreadable XML state, and already-disabled tasks unchanged

Fixes #87993.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts` - 132 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/daemon/schtasks.stop.test.ts -- -t "Scheduled Task autostart|enabled state|NUL-separated"` - 3 passed, 10 skipped
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/daemon/schtasks.ts src/daemon/schtasks.stop.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/daemon/schtasks.ts src/daemon/schtasks.stop.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, patch correct
- CI `check-test-types`: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26687031872/job/78656917561
- CI `checks-node-agentic-cli`: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26687031872/job/78656917882
- Native Windows CI `checks-windows-node-test`: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26687031872/job/78656917533

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Windows package updates no longer leave an enabled Scheduled Task free to relaunch the gateway while the package tree is being replaced.
Real environment tested: Native Windows CI `checks-windows-node-test` passed on SHA `52fc3efe6d88d2f90e86eeec66cab0247834ab73`; focused local regression tests passed on the rebased branch.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification.
Evidence after fix: tests assert `/DISABLE` happens before service stop/package install and `/ENABLE` happens after install, before post-core failure exit; tests also cover stopped and unknown installed task runtimes, `--no-restart` stopped/unknown runtimes, already-disabled task preservation, startup-fallback/no-schtasks no-op, Settings-level XML parsing, and NUL-separated XML output. Native Windows CI passed the branch.
Observed result after fix: focused regression tests, formatting/lint checks, autoreview, type checks, agentic CLI checks, and native Windows CI target lane passed.
What was not tested: full native Windows package update with a seeded legacy PT3M repeated Scheduled Task. Direct Azure Crabbox native Windows proof was blocked by capacity: `run_b9f14cd41731` failed with `Standard_D4ads_v6` unavailable in eastus and `run_bb068f4b20a5` failed with `Standard_D2ads_v5` unavailable in eastus. WSL2 package-update proof remains blocked on the available Windows runner: WSL default version is 2, but Ubuntu WSL2 import/exec failed after `HypervisorPlatform` returned reboot-required and Hyper-V-All was unavailable.

## CI note
Run 26687031872 has one unrelated failing shard at the time of this update: `checks-node-agentic-control-plane-runtime` failed in `src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts` on `lets explicit starts win after a manual timeout during recovery stop`. The touched update/daemon/native Windows target lanes above are green.
